Taker buy ratio: mean=0.4949, std=0.0480. Concentrated around 0.495 — near-symmetric buying/selling.
TBR predictive power: k=1: r=-0.0036 (p=0.6192); k=5: r=0.0124 (p=0.0906); k=10: r=0.0168 (p=0.0216); k=20: r=0.0265 (p=0.0003). TBR has negligible predictive power for future returns.

D1-native vs H4-aggregated-to-D1 ACF difference: mean=0.000160, max=0.000379. Minimal structural difference — D1 does not contain return-predictive information beyond what H4 already captures.
D1 regime conditioning changes H4 persistence structure. Regime provides a FRAMING variable, not additional return-predictive signal.
